problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus may resolve How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
